data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"1a6f-086b","generatedAt":"2026-04-15T21:16:34.992770+00:00","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Onboarding skill remediation: pre-flight context accumulation and UX calibration","description":"The DSO onboarding skill, beta-tested against real projects, revealed friction at every layer: non-technical users encountered engineering-specific questions they could not answer, the skill showed no progress indication, dependency installs required repeated manual approval prompts, and hook installation deadlocked on fresh repos.","successCriteria":["A pre-flight phase runs before any onboarding questions: user's comfort level is assessed, an optional document folder is scanned, stack and infrastructure are auto-detected, and a confidence context object is built","A non-technical user who runs onboarding without specifying a document folder reaches a fully configured DSO environment without encountering engineering-specific prompts","The user sees a progress indicator at every stage (e.g., 'Phase 3 of 6') and is never uncertain about how much of the onboarding remains","From first prompt to final commit, the user receives no more than 6 Claude Code tool-use approval prompts","Pre-commit is treated as a required dependency checked at start alongside bash and coreutils; hooks are installed as the final step after all other onboarding artifacts are committed","A user who specifies a document folder containing a PRD is asked strictly fewer open questions than in an equivalent run without the folder"]},"stories":[{"id":"95ca-2d8e","title":"As a developer or non-technical user, I begin onboarding with a comfort assessment that auto-builds a confidence context","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, first interaction is comfort question before auto-detection output","When complete, scratchpad contains confidence context object with per-dimension levels for all 7 areas","When complete, schema contract document exists in plugins/dso/docs/contracts/","When complete, unit tests pass for confidence level assignment logic"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Schema contract consumed by S2 and S3 \u2014 changes require coordinating downstream updates","[Reliability] Stack detection false positive risk","[Testing] Skill file changes require scripted session replay"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"A pre-flight phase runs before any onboarding questions"},{"id":"5e33-60aa","title":"As a user, I can specify a document folder so onboarding reads my existing project docs to pre-fill answers","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, --doc-folder scans folder, skips binary/large files (logged), extracts app name/stack/WCAG","When complete, large PDF skipped without stalling in <5s","When complete, at least one extracted fact elevates confidence level","When complete, dual-run shows higher confidence with folder","When complete, unit tests pass for document parsing and file-type guard"],"considerations":["[Security] Path traversal risk \u2014 validate user-specified folder path","[Performance] No guard on file count or total scan time","[Reliability] Binary file stall \u2014 handle encoding errors gracefully"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95ca-2d8e"],"satisfiesCriterion":"an optional document folder is scanned; A user who specifies a document folder is asked strictly fewer open questions"},{"id":"d875-4466","title":"As a user, onboarding asks only questions not already answered at high confidence, routing by the confidence context","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, high-confidence area skipped with summary line","When complete, non-technical user never sees engineering-specific prompts","When complete, medium-confidence shows pre-filled confirm","When complete, routing handles doc-folder-elevated confidence","When complete, unit tests pass for routing logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Handle missing dimensions \u2014 default to low confidence","[Testing] Requires scripted session fixture with mocked confidence context"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95ca-2d8e","5e33-60aa"],"satisfiesCriterion":"routing all subsequent questions; non-technical user without engineering-specific prompts"},{"id":"de10-d759","title":"As a user, the onboarding session requires no more than 6 tool-use approval prompts, grouped into named batch scripts","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, fresh-repo run produces at most 6 tool-use approval prompts","When complete, no approval outside named groups","When complete, each prompt names its group","When complete, empty groups skip their prompt"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Empty groups from S3 routing must not produce empty approval dialogs"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"no more than 6 Claude Code tool-use approval prompts"},{"id":"cd7b-5b1a","title":"As a developer, pre-commit is a required dependency and hooks are installed as the final step after all artifacts are committed","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, pre-commit in Step 0 dep scan alongside bash/coreutils/git","When complete, hooks installed in group 5 after groups 1-4 committed","When complete, fresh-repo run completes without hook-induced failure","When complete, hook install commit bypasses review/test gates"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Interrupted onboarding between group 4 and 5 \u2014 offer resume from group 5 on re-run","[Reliability] Hook orphan \u2014 validate git state before hook install commit"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["de10-d759"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Pre-commit is treated as a required dependency; hooks installed as final step; fresh-repo run completes without hook failure"},{"id":"26d0-eccf","title":"Update project docs to reflect onboarding skill restructuring","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, CLAUDE.md accurately reflects command/reference changes","When complete, KNOWN-ISSUES.md resolved entries updated"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["95ca-2d8e","5e33-60aa","d875-4466","de10-d759","cd7b-5b1a"],"satisfiesCriterion":"all epic success criteria (documentation accuracy)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["95ca-2d8e","5e33-60aa","d875-4466"]},"escalationPolicy":"Escalate when blocked","adversarialReview":{"redTeamFindings":6,"blueTeamAccepted":3,"blueTeamRejected":3,"applied":{"newStories":0,"modifiedDDs":2,"newDependencies":1,"newConsiderations":0}}}
